hero.tagline: La plataforma de seguridad ofensiva de África

body.allRoomsComplete: Has completado todas las salas disponibles.

body.installDesc: Añade a la pantalla de inicio para un acceso más rápido y soporte sin conexión.
body.ctaDescription: Únete a los operadores en formación de seguridad ofensiva en toda África. Comienza con los módulos fundamentales, avanza por las fases del bootcamp y gana puntos cibernéticos. No se requiere experiencia — solo compromiso.
body.footerDesc: Plataforma de seguridad ofensiva — descubre, explota, reporta. El primer ecosistema dedicado a operaciones ofensivas de África.
body.liveNode: QYVORA — NODO EN VIVO — TAMALE, GHANA
body.simulatedNetwork: Simulated corporate network environment for terminal practice

labs.title: Attack Labs
labs.desc: 10 live labs — crack passwords, inject SQL, escalate privileges, and phish real targets in sandboxed environments.

courses.title: Self-Paced Courses
courses.desc: 12 structured courses across terminal, networking, web security, programming, and tools — earn CP as you learn.

bootcamp.title: Hacker Protocol Bootcamp
bootcamp.desc: 5-phase guided bootcamp from mindset to exploitation. 19 rooms, 100+ walkthrough steps, CP on completion.

services.title: Penetration Testing
services.desc: Enterprise-grade security assessments. OWASP Top 10, business logic analysis, and remediation retesting.

labs.heading: Attack Labs
labs.description: 10 sandboxed environments. Real tools, real vulnerabilities, real exploits.

privesc.title: Privilege Escalation
privesc.desc: Escalate permissions and gain root access through misconfigs, kernel exploits, and SUID binaries

passwords.title: Password Cracking
passwords.desc: Crack hashes using brute-force, dictionary attacks, and rule-based generation

webapp.title: Web Exploitation
webapp.desc: Exploit XSS, SSRF, deserialization, and access control flaws in modern web apps

sqli.title: SQL Injection
sqli.desc: Extract databases through union-based, blind, and time-based injection vectors

phishing.title: Phishing Analysis
phishing.desc: Identify phishing kits, analyze email headers, and trace social engineering campaigns

proxy.title: Web Proxy
proxy.desc: Intercept, modify, and replay HTTP traffic using Burp Suite and mitmproxy

traffic.title: Traffic Analysis
traffic.desc: Analyze PCAP files, detect anomalies, and reconstruct sessions from network captures

osint.title: OSINT Recon
osint.desc: Gather intelligence from public sources, breach databases, and map attack surfaces

wireless.title: Wireless Security
wireless.desc: Test WPA2 handshakes, rogue APs, and deauthentication vulnerabilities

killchain.title: Kill Chain
killchain.desc: Full pentest from recon to exploitation — chain every skill into a complete attack narrative

courses.heading: Courses
courses.description: 12 courses across 6 categories. Each lesson earns CP.

linuxTerminal101.title: Linux Terminal 101
linuxTerminal101.desc: Master the Linux command line from scratch.

networking101.title: Networking 101
networking101.desc: IP addresses, ports, protocols, and the OSI model.

bootcamp.description: 5 phases. From mindset to exploitation. A guided path from zero to operator.

curriculum.heading: What You'll Learn
curriculum.description: Five phases of structured offensive-security training, from foundations to advanced exploitation.

events.heading: Live Events
events.description: Join live offensive security sessions and compete in real-time challenges.

finalCta.description: Join operators training in offensive security across Africa. Start with foundational modules, progress through bootcamp phases, and earn cyber points. No experience required — just commitment.

learn.title: Learn
learn.desc: Master offensive security foundations with structured modules covering Linux, networking, and web exploitation.

practice.title: Practice
practice.desc: Execute real exploits in simulated attack labs. Capture flags and chain vulnerabilities in production-mirror environments.

prove.title: Prove
prove.desc: Earn on-chain CP credentials that validate your expertise and build a verifiable track record of proficiency.

leaderboard.heading: Top Operators
leaderboard.description: Ranked by CyberPoints earned. All balances verified on the QYVORA Chain.

quiteroot.description: The research and engineering collective behind QYVORA's offensive tooling, intelligence, and operator-focused security experiments.

features.report: Single PDF Report with Executive Summary
